title: Young entrepreneurs shine at Union Preparatory’s market day
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"GRAAFF-REINET NEWS - Union Preparatory School’s annual Grade 3 Market Day took place on 22 October, bringing colour, laughter and excitement to the Puggy Munnik Field, where the young entrepreneurs could erect their own stalls and start their own business among friends.","html":"GRAAFF-REINET NEWS - Union Preparatory School’s annual Grade 3 Market Day took place on 22 October, bringing colour, laughter and excitement to the Puggy Munnik Field, where the young entrepreneurs could erect their own stalls and start their own business among friends."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"There was something for everyone to enjoy with the little ones selling anything from sweet treats to creative games and handmade goodies."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Grade 3s showed off their entrepreneurial flair, planning, creating, selling and learning - all while having an absolute blast!","html":"The Grade 3s showed off their entrepreneurial flair, planning, creating, selling and learning - all while having an absolute blast!"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Older learners of all the Union Schools were top customers at these stalls and gave brilliant support to the budding young business owners.","html":"Older learners of all the Union Schools were top customers at these stalls and gave brilliant support to the budding young business owners."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Enthusiasm and encouragement helped to make the day an unforgettable success - proof that learning really can be as sweet as it is fun.","html":"Enthusiasm and encouragement helped to make the day an unforgettable success - proof that learning really can be as sweet as it is fun."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Young entrepreneurs shine at Union Preparatory’s market day
